# GitHub Copilot Instructions

This file is intentionally minimal.

`AGENTS.md` at the repository root is the single source of truth for agent behavior, workflow, and quality expectations.

## Required startup flow

1. Read `AGENTS.md` completely before making changes.
2. Follow path-specific instruction files in `.github/instructions/*.instructions.md` for the files you edit.
3. If any guidance conflicts, `AGENTS.md` takes precedence.

Do not duplicate large instruction sections here; keep this file as a bootstrap entry point for Copilot.
